seo_title: Buzz Cut Filter — See Yourself With a Buzz Cut Online | LazyKiwi
seo_description: Try the buzz cut filter from LazyKiwi. Upload one photo and see yourself with a realistic buzz cut or fade in seconds — before you reach for the clippers.

hero.title: See yourself with a buzz cut first.
hero.description: Thinking about the big shave? Upload one photo and preview a realistic buzz cut or fade on your own head before the clippers come out.

what_it_is.title: The shave is permanent. The preview isn't.
what_it_is.intro: The LazyKiwi buzz cut filter shows you a believable buzz cut on your own face, fitted to your head shape and hairline — so you can commit to (or talk yourself out of) the big chop with confidence.

steps.title: Upload your photo
steps.description: A clear, well-lit photo is all you need. Your photo, your starting point.

steps.title: Pick a buzz length
steps.description: Choose a buzz length or fade and let the AI apply it.

steps.title: Generate & download
steps.description: Preview the result, try a few more, then download your favourite.

features.title: A buzz that fits your head
features.description: The AI respects your hairline and head shape so the buzz looks like a real cut, including stubble texture.

features.title: From a zero to a longer guard
features.description: Preview different clipper lengths and fades to find the one that suits you.

features.title: Commit with confidence
features.description: See the result before you shave so there are no surprises in the mirror.

showcase.title: One photo, every length
showcase.subtitle: Preview the buzz before you commit.

cards.title: Seconds, not days
cards.description: Results render almost instantly, so you can compare options before your coffee's cold.

cards.title: Private by default
cards.description: Your photos are processed securely and never sold. What you upload stays yours.

cards.title: Free to start
cards.description: No credit card to try. Get a real result on your own photo at zero cost.

cards.title: No regret
cards.description: Test the change risk-free and decide with your own eyes.

cards.title: Made for you
cards.description: Tuned for natural, believable results — not a filter slapped on top.

cards.title: No skills needed
cards.description: No Photoshop, no prompts to master. Upload, tap, done.

quotes.quote: I was nervous to try this, saw it on my own photo in seconds, and I'm obsessed. So much easier than guessing.
quotes.name: Mia R.

quotes.quote: Showed the LazyKiwi preview instead of trying to describe what I wanted. First time I got exactly what I pictured.
quotes.name: Daniel K.

quotes.quote: My before/after post blew up — it looks real because the buzz cut actually fits. Total game changer.
quotes.name: Priya S.

faqs.question: Is the buzz cut filter free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a photo and preview a buzz cut for free.

faqs.question: Will it look realistic?
faqs.answer: Yes. The AI fits the buzz to your head shape and hairline with natural stubble texture.

faqs.question: Can women try it too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely — the filter works for anyone curious about a buzz cut.

faqs.question: What photo works best?
faqs.answer: A clear, front-facing photo with your hairline and head visible.

cta.title: See yourself with a buzz cut before you shave.
cta.description: Upload one photo and preview a realistic buzz cut or fade in seconds — free.
